blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Order confirmation blocked: POST /api/v1/sales/orders/1/confirm returns 'Order cannot be confirmed because no stock is reserved for line items'. Order creation works (created MOCK-2026-00002) but stock reservation workflow is not triggered automatically.
Order confirmation blocked by stock reservation. Orders can now be created successfully but cannot be confirmed. Requires backend stock reservation seeding or automatic reservation on order creation.
No confirmed orders for list/detail consistency testing. Order MOCK-2026-00002 exists but in RESERVED status, cannot confirm due to stock reservation.
No confirmed orders to test cancellation flow. CancelDialog component verified but cannot test against actual order.
No confirmed orders for dispatch preview testing. Order confirmation blocked by stock reservation.
No dispatched orders/invoices for Sales/Accounting consistency testing. Entire O2C pipeline blocked at confirmation step.
No dispatched/paid invoices for return eligibility testing. O2C pipeline blocked at confirmation step.
No dealer transactions for dealer-scoped consistency testing. Order creation works but cannot complete full O2C cycle.

Partial improvement: Accounting periods API now works and returns data. Period LOCK succeeds. However, period CLOSE requires maker-checker workflow ('Direct close is disabled; submit /request-close and approve') and period REOPEN returns Access Denied for accounting user. Cannot test full lifecycle without maker-checker seeding or superadmin permissions.

Raw materials now exist (3 items: RM-RESIN, RM-PIG, RM-CAN with stock), but no Purchase Orders seeded. PO create requires 'lines' field (not 'items'). Backend returns validation errors on PO creation attempts.
No approved Purchase Orders in MOCK seed data. GRN dropdown correctly empty until POs are created and approved.
No GRNs to test stock update across Accounting and Factory surfaces. Requires seeded PO -> approval -> GRN workflow data.
No GRNs available for purchase invoice flow testing. GRN endpoint works but returns empty data.
No GRNs/invoices for payables state visibility testing. P2P pipeline blocked at PO creation/approval step.
No purchase invoices for return quantity cap testing. P2P pipeline blocked.

Raw material intake persists but stock view may require reload or different endpoint. Raw materials endpoint shows stock (RM-RESIN: 500, RM-PIG: 200, RM-CAN: 1000) but intake-to-stock persistence needs verification after intake submission.

orchestratorDeferral.justification: Round-2 accounting workflow user testing confirmed the implemented frontend behavior where the backend contract and seed data were available. The remaining 16 assertions were deferred because they are blocked by backend stock-reservation behavior, maker-checker or reopen-role requirements, canonical PO/GRN seed-chain availability, and raw-material intake readback ambiguity rather than unfinished frontend workflow UI.
